decision: BRONS, ZILVER and GOUD may not assign formal or advisory A/B/C; unchosen items remain DOOR_MARK_TE_BEOORDELEN
For candidate or cluster runs, GOUD completion requires all run-required practical user products, normally a readable decision PDF and complete KML, in addition to technical audit artifacts
decision_source: GitHub issue #22 and INDIA3 migration mandate
note: Operationally supersedes the old separate INDIA2 rendering handoff without deleting historical decisions.

decision: Any coordinate explicitly rejected by Mark may not be restored; unresolved GEO must remain candidate-specific and must not block the other 39 candidates
note: Use NOT_ESTABLISHED, TOOL_LIMITED or one specific Mark-link request.
